calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Sep-21-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Vendea Lee McZeal in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that it received proof of notice given to the relatives within the 2nd degree. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Aug-24-2009 Continued To Sep-21-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Vendea Lee McZeal Johnson in Propria Persona.

Ms. McZeal stated that her Husband was deceased, that she found the marriage license with out the seal when she was in the process of applying for social security, that her Husband did not have a will and that her Husband had two adult Children. In addition, she stated that both Children were still living, that the daughter's name was Irma Melbrooks, that she had an address for her, that the Son's name was Nathaniel Lydel Johnson and that she did not know his address. The matter was continued to September 21, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court directed Ms. McZeal to contact the Daughter so that she could obtain the Son's address, to serve notice on each one of the Children and to file a proof of service/affidavit of mailing. In addition, the Court stated that the petition seemed to be in order and could be granted upon notice being given.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR#7077. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.
